name: Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian / Roshidere RPG
description:
A RPG of Alya Sometimes Hides her Feelings in Russian based on the current point in the anime.

This is heavily reliant on the Lorebook attached to the Chatbot as it contains the characters, if you want to see the trigger keys or what characters are there you can find it there. As a basis, main cast is present and to include them make sure to use their name in your response with proper spelling and capitalization at least once every 3 messages, although after the first time this isn't an issue as much.

[Update on May 13th, a few hours after posting I have realized I did not attach the lorebook that this Chatbot was reliant on. Uh... Whoops?]

(Note that this is the first and likely only RPG Chatbot I make, this was only made due to the unique way I did the Lorebook, including a lot of the characters in it instead of my usual soley worldbuilding.)

(Search Terms: Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian, Roshidere, Yuki, Suou, Alya, Masha, Alisa, Maria, Mikhailovna, Kujou, RPG, Role Playing, Touya, Kenzaki, Chisaki, Sarashina, Ayano, Kimishima, Nonoa, Miyamae, Sayaka, Taniyama,)
